meta.disclaimer: SYNTHETIC demo data — generated, not measured. Read-only; no calibration is written or flashed.

build_state.notes: 2020 Hellcat Redeye 6.2 SC, 3.0in upper pulley, E85 -- ~1000 whp goal. CONFIRM: pump / injectors / snout / ethanol % / belt PN (best-estimate). Current safe base tune ~11-12 psi; 3in-pulley headroom to ~14-15 psi as fueling is validated.

acquisition.measures: Engine / power / safety channels, barometric, ambient temp, vehicle speed
acquisition.comms: OBD-II port -> vehicle CAN bus -> MPVI3 -> USB (Surface)

acquisition.measures: ET, trap, 0-60, GPS ground speed (slip reference)

acquisition.comms: ABS/TCM module -> CAN bus -> VCM Scanner (only if exposed)
acquisition.transfer: VCM Scanner: Add Channel -> search 'wheel'; if present, add to the layout
OPTIONAL -- humidity is otherwise assumed; DA is only weakly sensitive

acquisition.measures: Air temp / baro / humidity / density altitude
acquisition.transfer: REPLACED -- density altitude now computed from the log (baro + ambient temp)

runs.notes: auto WOT pull; peak 6292 rpm, 11.1 psi boost

flags.msg: outcome and pyrometer reads disagree on pressure

slip.note: no wheel-speed channels logged — live slip unavailable; using 60-ft + pyrometer

flags.msg: outcome and pyrometer reads disagree on pressure

tire.notes: SYNTHETIC: assumed tire set/pyro for demo

engine_snapshot.label: Engine speed
engine_snapshot.meaning: Crankshaft RPM — how fast the engine is turning.

engine_snapshot.label: Vehicle speed
engine_snapshot.meaning: Road speed from the non-driven wheels.

engine_snapshot.label: Gear
engine_snapshot.meaning: Current trans gear — context for where boost/knock happen in the pull.

engine_snapshot.label: Barometric
engine_snapshot.meaning: Ambient air pressure; boost is measured above this, not a fixed 101 kPa.

engine_snapshot.label: Manifold pressure
engine_snapshot.meaning: Absolute pressure in the intake; above barometric is boost.

engine_snapshot.label: Boost (true)
engine_snapshot.meaning: MAP minus barometric — the real boost the blower is making.

engine_snapshot.label: Blower bypass
engine_snapshot.meaning: Supercharger bypass position; closes to build boost, opens off-throttle.

engine_snapshot.label: Airflow
engine_snapshot.meaning: Total mass airflow into the engine — load indicator.

engine_snapshot.label: Throttle
engine_snapshot.meaning: Driver throttle command; 100% is wide open.

engine_snapshot.label: Intake air temp
engine_snapshot.meaning: Charge-air temp after the blower/intercooler — heat soak risk.

engine_snapshot.label: Actual spark
engine_snapshot.meaning: Timing the PCM is actually running right now.

engine_snapshot.label: MBT spark
engine_snapshot.meaning: Best-torque timing target; the gap to Actual Spark is your knock margin.

engine_snapshot.label: Knock retard
engine_snapshot.meaning: Timing pulled to stop detonation — want ~0.

engine_snapshot.label: Knock sensor
engine_snapshot.meaning: Raw knock-sensor activity; spikes flag detonation events.

engine_snapshot.label: Commanded EQ
engine_snapshot.meaning: Air/fuel the tune is asking for; >1 is rich.

engine_snapshot.label: Measured EQ
engine_snapshot.meaning: What the wideband actually sees; should track command.

engine_snapshot.label: Fuel pressure
engine_snapshot.meaning: Rail pressure; a drop under load means the pump is signing off.

engine_snapshot.label: Desired fuel press
engine_snapshot.meaning: Commanded rail pressure — compare to actual to catch a fueling shortfall.

engine_snapshot.label: Injector duty
engine_snapshot.meaning: Derived from pulse width; near 100% means no fuel headroom left.

engine_snapshot.label: Exhaust temp
engine_snapshot.meaning: Exhaust gas temperature — fueling/timing heat indicator.

engine_snapshot.label: Coolant temp
engine_snapshot.meaning: Engine coolant temperature.

engine_snapshot.label: LTR coolant
engine_snapshot.meaning: Low-temp radiator loop feeding the intercooler.

engine_snapshot.label: LTR pump
engine_snapshot.meaning: Intercooler coolant pump speed.

engine_snapshot.label: Oil temp
engine_snapshot.meaning: Engine oil temperature.

engine_snapshot.label: Oil pressure
engine_snapshot.meaning: Engine oil pressure.

engine_snapshot.label: Actual torque
engine_snapshot.meaning: Engine torque estimate; vs Expected shows if a limiter is holding it back.

engine_snapshot.label: System voltage
engine_snapshot.meaning: Control-module supply voltage.

retune.table_target: Spark Advance (High Octane) RPM x MAP
retune.rationale: Pull 1.0deg here; knock is direct evidence, pulling timing is always safe.

retune.table_target: Spark Advance (High Octane) RPM x MAP
retune.rationale: Pull 1.0deg here; knock is direct evidence, pulling timing is always safe.
Drop ~1.5 psi (small step into new territory) to settle launch spin; verify on the next pass.
